items.title: Microsoft (MSFT) Positions for Long-Term AI and Enterprise Growth
items.description: Microsoft Corporation (NASDAQ:MSFT) is one of Goldman Sachs’s top growth stock picks. On February 18, Microsoft Corporation (NASDAQ:MSFT) and CrowdStrike announced that the CrowdStrike Falcon cybersecurity platform is now available for purchase on Microsoft Marketplace. Customers can now apply existing Microsoft Azure Consumption Commitment (ACC) toward those purchases. Microsoft said the marketplace availability is designed […]
